Footer.blurb: A small studio building a safer, more imaginative internet for young readers. COPPA-compliant. Moderated by humans. Loved by families.
Footer.copyright: The Hero's Forge. All tales reserved.
Footer.finePrint: Bound in parchment · Printed with ember

Hero.eyebrow: A studio for young authors · Ages 7–12
Hero.body: The Hero's Forge is an illustrated storytelling studio where children co-write magical adventures with a gentle AI storyteller. Every page is theirs. Every choice matters. Every tale becomes a real, printed book they can hold.

PublicReader.eyebrow: § The community ledger · A published tale
PublicReader.remixFailed: The forge ran cold. Try again.
PublicReader.remixRateLimited: You've already started a story this week — come back next week for a new adventure.

Manuscript.sealText: · Chapter One · The door is open · Chapter One ·
Manuscript.p1Before: Maren pressed her palm against the glowing door. The
Manuscript.p1After: hummed behind it, full of things that had waited a very long time to meet her.
Manuscript.p1End: whispered a small voice near her boots.
Manuscript.question: What will Maren do?

enchanted-forest.name: Enchanted Forest
enchanted-forest.description: A glowing woodland where talking animals guard ancient secrets.

space-station.name: Space Station
space-station.description: A bustling orbital outpost full of clever robots and zero-gravity hallways.

underwater-kingdom.name: Underwater Kingdom
underwater-kingdom.description: A sparkling reef city where dolphins carry messages between coral towers.

dragon-mountain.name: Dragon Mountain
dragon-mountain.description: A craggy peak where gentle dragons teach young heroes to soar.

desert-oasis.name: Desert Oasis
desert-oasis.description: A shimmering palm oasis hiding a hidden library beneath the dunes.

cloud-city.name: Cloud City
cloud-city.description: A floating town of rope bridges and rainbow gardens high above the world.

ticker: — she brought a map of her own
— the key was made of starlight
— a library at the bottom of the sea

steps.title: Choose a hero
steps.body: Three gentle questions — a name, a heart, a wish. Your child's imagination sets the compass.

steps.title: Shape the world
steps.body: Pick a hand-illustrated world: a moonlit forest, a clockwork city, the bottom of a glassy sea.

steps.title: Live the adventure
steps.body: Each page arrives like a letter. Three choices — or write your own. When the tale ends, we bind it into a real book.

worlds.blurb: Every world is illustrated in-house by real artists. Your child chooses where to land — the quill does the rest.

sample.eyebrow: § III · A page from the tale
sample.body: Each page is written at a 4th–5th grade reading level, screened by an independent moderator, and illustrated selectively so the picture follows the words — not the other way around.
sample.p1: The door was warm to the touch — warmer than a mitten fresh from the fire. It smelled faintly of cinnamon and old rain. Maren cupped her hands around the
sample.p1b: and found it was shaped, strangely, like a small sleeping fox. She had a feeling the fox had been waiting a long time to wake up.
sample.p2After: held its breath. Ahead, the door hummed a single, patient note. Maren thought it sounded rather like a question.
sample.question: What does Maren do next?
sample.customHint: Or write your own — we'll follow your lead

parents.intro: We built the Forge for our own kids first. That meant starting with the hardest question: what would make a parent trust an AI with their child's inner world?

pillars.title: Four layers of safety
pillars.body: Pre-prompt screening, G-rated LLM guardrails, post-generation review, and a human moderation desk — every word your child sees passes all four.

pillars.title: COPPA by design
pillars.body: No ad tracking, no data sale, parent-verified accounts, instant export or deletion on request. Children are not the product.

pillars.title: Read every word
pillars.body: A weekly parchment-paper digest arrives in your inbox. Every tale your child writes is readable, verbatim — no summaries.

pillars.title: You set the knobs
pillars.body: Daily time limits, content strictness, community publishing, remix permissions. Your child's profile, your rules.

pricing.footnote: Printed books sold separately via our partner bindery · shipped worldwide.

tiers.name: Apprentice
tiers.desc: One tale a week. All worlds. Full parent dashboard.

tiers.name: Scribe
tiers.desc: Unlimited tales, audio narration, illustrated pages, remixing.

tiers.name: Guild
tiers.desc: Up to four child profiles. Everything in Scribe, for the whole family.

finalCta.body: Free forever for your first tale. No credit card. No ads. No tracking. Just a small voice near your child's boots, whispering "you're late."

Characters.emptyHint: Characters are discovered automatically as your children write stories. You can also add them manually.
Characters.dialogDescription: Describe this character so the storyteller stays consistent across tales.
Characters.name: Character name
Characters.descriptionHint: Physical appearance, personality, or notable traits (1–2 sentences).
Characters.deleteConfirm: Remove this character? They won't appear in future stories.

StoryNew.intro: The drafting buddy will shape your hero, pick a world, and listen to the trouble they face. Nothing is saved until you press Begin.
StoryNew.step1Hint: A first name is plenty. You can change it later.
StoryNew.step2Hint: Pick a world. Each has its own mood and light.
StoryNew.step3Hint: A sentence or two is enough — the storyteller will do the rest.
StoryNew.step3Placeholder: A silver fox keeps tapping at the window after dusk, but no one else can see it…
StoryNew.missingName: Your hero needs a name first.
StoryNew.missingWorld: Pick a world to set the scene.
StoryNew.submitFailed: The scribe stumbled. Try again in a moment.
StoryNew.rateLimited: You've already started a tale this week! Continue an existing draft from My Stories, or come back next week for a new adventure.
StoryNew.lockedBody: Sign in to begin a new tale. The drafting buddy will be waiting for you.

Children.emptyBody: Add your first child to set their age, reading strictness, and daily time limit.
Children.dialogDescription: These settings guide the storyteller on every page your child reads.
Children.strictnessHint: How gently the storyteller handles peril, sadness, and conflict.
Children.allowPublish: Allow publishing to the shared library
Children.allowRemix: Allow other children to remix their tales
Children.deleteConfirm: Delete this child profile? This cannot be undone.
